# Companion by Danè — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org/

# This file helps AI tools understand this website's purpose and content.
# It is supplemental to standard HTML and structured data.

## Site name
Companion by Danè

## Summary
Companion by Danè is a human-led, AI-supported coaching platform founded by Danè de Klerk.
It combines Danè's human coaching expertise with an always-on AI companion that helps clients
build confidence, clarity, self-trust and purposeful action between coaching sessions.
The platform uses an integral coaching approach — working with head, heart and body.
It is a coaching and personal growth service. It is not therapy, medical advice, crisis support
or any form of emergency mental-health treatment.

## Primary audience
Adults seeking personal growth, confidence, clarity and self-trust coaching.
Available online and internationally, with a primary base in South Africa.

## Key URLs
- Homepage: https://companionai.coach/
- About Danè: https://companionai.coach/about-dane
- AI Coaching Companion: https://companionai.coach/ai-coaching-companion
- Integral Coaching: https://companionai.coach/integral-coaching
- Pricing: https://companionai.coach/pricing
- FAQ: https://companionai.coach/faq
- Contact: https://companionai.coach/contact
- Resources: https://companionai.coach/resources
- Privacy Policy: https://companionai.coach/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://companionai.coach/terms
- Sitemap: https://companionai.coach/sitemap.xml

## Brand positioning
Human-led. AI-supported. Warm. Premium. Reflective. Trustworthy.
The AI companion supports reflection between sessions. Danè remains the human coaching anchor.

## Key topics
- AI coaching companion
- Integral coaching
- Confidence coaching
- Self-trust coaching
- Clarity and reflection
- Personal growth
- Coaching for difficult conversations
- Finding your voice
- Online coaching

## Safety disclaimer
This service is coaching and personal growth support. It is not therapy, psychiatry,
psychology, medical advice, crisis intervention or emergency mental-health support.
If you are in immediate danger, please contact your local emergency services.

## Contact
https://companionai.coach/contact
